turns.q: Can I change the shipping address on an order I just placed?
turns.replyTail:
me orders ship the same day.

Please double-check your order status in your order confirmation email or on your order confirmation page. If you cannot find the email, Gmail users should check the Promotions tab.

If the order has not shipped yet, call Shoebacca Customer Service immediately at 1-888-446-1788. They’re available Monday–Friday: 7am–8pm CST, Saturday: 10am–6pm CST, Sunday: 12pm–6pm CST.

Please leave your email address so the team can help from here.
